verdicts.reasoning: The description accurately reflects Salesforce as a cloud-based CRM platform providing APIs to manage CRM data.
The URL for auth methods returned a 403 error, preventing verification of the claim regarding OAuth 2.0 flows.
The URL for credential access returned a 403 error, preventing verification of the claim about signing up for a free Developer Edition.
The URL for API surface returned a 403 error, preventing verification of the claim regarding the breadth of the REST and GraphQL APIs.
The buildability claim cannot be confirmed due to the lack of accessible evidence supporting the claims about Developer Edition and API access.
